pages.title: Pylon Infra Design | Contemporary Architecture
pages.text: Pylon Infra Design | Contemporary Architecture Pylon Infra Design Home Projects Firm Process Contact Chat Home Projects Firm Process Contact Chat Residential Private Cottage Puri, Odisha Strength in Structure. Vision in Design. View Projects Schedule a Consultation 01 / 04 Philosophy Design Rooted in Purpose Pylon Infra Design is a contemporary practice built on stability, connection, and support. We create architecture that is thoughtful, sustainable, and enduring — guided by client-centered design and technical excellence. Client-Centered Design Every project begins with listening. We craft architecture around the unique needs, aspirations, and contexts of those who will inhabit our spaces. Sustainable Innovation We are committed to environmentally responsible design that minimizes impact while maximizing the quality and longevity of built environments. Functional Aesthetics Beauty rooted in usability. Our designs achieve visual elegance through structural logic, material honesty, and spatial clarity. Featured Work Selected Projects View All Residential Private Cottage Puri, Odisha Urban Design Beautification of Jharsuguda Airport Road Jharsuguda, Odisha Institutional Architecture 50-Bedded Hostel Dumarpadar, Kalahandi View All Projects Services Comprehensive Architectural & Design Services 01 Architectural Design Comprehensive building design from concept through construction, integrating BIM workflows and 3D modeling for precision and clarity. 02 Interior Design Thoughtful interior spaces that balance aesthetics with functionality, creating environments that inspire and perform. 03 Structural Design Engineering excellence in structural systems, ensuring safety, durability, and material efficiency across all project types. 04 Project Management End-to-end project oversight from planning to handover, ensuring quality, timeline adherence, and budget control. 05 Quantity Survey & Estimation Detailed cost analysis and quantity surveying to deliver accurate budgets and optimize resource allocation. Process Our Collaborative Design Process 01 Initial Consultation We begin with understanding your vision, requirements, site context, and aspirations through in-depth dialogue. 02 Design Development Iterative design exploration using BIM, 3Ds Max, and SketchUp to create detailed 3D models and spatial solutions. 03 Construction Documentation Comprehensive technical drawings, specifications, and documentation ready for precise construction execution. 04 Construction Administration On-site oversight and project management ensuring design intent is faithfully translated into built reality. Team Our Strength Lies in Our People Payoswini Priyadarshini Founder Ar. Jyotsnamayee Sahoo Head Architect Prabin Kumar Satapathy Structural Engineer Puravi Mohapatra Design Lead Saptarsini Roul Design Team Sunita panigrahi Design Team Meet the Full Team Let's Create Your Vision We are ready to bring your architectural vision to life. Contact Us Book a Consultation Pylon Infra Design Contemporary architecture shaped by clarity, sustainability, and technical precision. Navigation Home Projects Firm Process Contact Services Architectural Design Interior Design Structural Design Project Management Quantity Survey © 2026 Pylon Infra Design. All rights reserved. info@pyloninfradesign.com +91 674 XXX XXXX

pages.title: Firm | Pylon Infra Design
pages.text: Firm | Pylon Infra Design Pylon Infra Design Home Projects Firm Process Contact Chat Home Projects Firm Process Contact Chat About Us The Firm Who We Are Pylon Infra Design is a new-generation architectural practice built on strength, clarity, and purpose. Our work bridges vision and reality — transforming ideas into sustainable, functional, and enduring spaces. Guided by client-centered design and supported by advanced BIM and 3D modeling technologies, we deliver architecture that is both innovative and deeply contextual. Our portfolio spans government institutions, residential developments, urban beautification, and structural engineering. "Our work bridges vision and reality, transforming ideas into built forms that are thoughtful, sustainable, and enduring." 50+ Projects Completed 15+ Years Experience 12 Team Members 5 Service Verticals Design Philosophy Our Values Shape Every Project Client-Centered Every project begins with listening. We design around the unique needs and aspirations of our clients. Sustainable Committed to environmentally responsible design that minimizes impact and maximizes longevity. Precise Technical excellence through BIM workflows, 3D modeling, and meticulous construction documentation. Technology-Driven We utilize BIM, 3Ds Max, and SketchUp to create detailed 3D models and visualizations. Contextual Architecture deeply responsive to site, climate, culture, and the communities we serve. Innovative Pushing boundaries while respecting the fundamentals of good design and structural integrity. Leadership Meet Our Team Payoswini Priyadarshini Founder With over 15 years of experience in architectural practice, Payoswini founded Pylon Infra Design with a vision to create architecture that bridges vision and reality. His expertise spans institutional, residential, and urban design. Ar. Jyotsnamayee Sahoo Head Architect Jyotsnamayee brings a refined design sensibility and deep knowledge of sustainable building practices. She leads the design team in translating complex briefs into elegant architectural solutions. Prabin Kumar Satapathy Structural Engineer Prabin ensures every structure we design is built to last. His structural engineering expertise guarantees safety, durability, and material efficiency across all project types. Puravi Mohapatra Design Lead Puravi leads our interior and visualization team, bringing spaces to life through thoughtful material selection, lighting design, and spatial planning. Saptarsini Roul Design Team Saptarsini leads our interior and visualization team, bringing spaces to life through thoughtful material selection, lighting design, and spatial planning. Sunita panigrahi Design Team Sunita leads our interior and visualization team, bringing spaces to life through thoughtful material selection, lighting design, and spatial planning. Pylon Infra Design Contemporary architecture shaped by clarity, sustainability, and technical precision. Navigation Home Projects Firm Process Contact Services Architectural Design Interior Design Structural Design Project Management Quantity Survey © 2026 Pylon Infra Design. All rights reserved. info@pyloninfradesign.com +91 674 XXX XXXX

pages.title: Process | Pylon Infra Design
pages.text: Process | Pylon Infra Design Pylon Infra Design Home Projects Firm Process Contact Chat Home Projects Firm Process Contact Chat How We Work Our Process A structured, collaborative approach that transforms your vision into built reality — with clarity at every stage. 01 Initial Consultation Every project begins with a conversation. We listen to understand your vision, requirements, budget, and timeline. Through site visits and research, we establish the foundation for a successful project. Key Deliverables Project brief documentation Site analysis report Preliminary budget framework Project timeline overview 02 Design Development Our design team explores spatial solutions through iterative sketching, BIM modeling, and 3D visualization. We present multiple concepts, refining them through collaborative dialogue until the design fully embodies your vision. Key Deliverables Conceptual design options 3D visualizations & walkthroughs Material & finish selections Detailed floor plans & elevations 03 Construction Documentation We prepare comprehensive technical drawings and specifications that leave no detail to chance. Our BIM-driven documentation ensures accuracy, coordination, and clarity for the construction team. Key Deliverables Complete working drawings Structural calculations MEP coordination documents Bill of quantities & estimates 04 Construction Administration Our team provides on-site supervision and project management throughout the construction phase. We ensure design intent is faithfully translated into built reality while maintaining quality, budget, and schedule. Key Deliverables Regular site inspections Quality assurance reports Progress monitoring Final handover documentation Technology Tools We Use Advanced BIM and 3D modeling technologies that enable precision, collaboration, and exceptional design outcomes. AutoCAD Drafting Revit (BIM) 3D Modeling 3Ds Max Visualization SketchUp Conceptual Design V-Ray Rendering Lumion Real-time Viz Ready to Start Your Project? Begin with a conversation. We will guide you through every step of the design and construction process. Schedule a Consultation Pylon Infra Design Contemporary architecture shaped by clarity, sustainability, and technical precision. Navigation Home Projects Firm Process Contact Services Architectural Design Interior Design Structural Design Project Management Quantity Survey © 2026 Pylon Infra Design. All rights reserved. info@pyloninfradesign.com +91 674 XXX XXXX

pages.title: Beautification of Jharsuguda Airport Road | Pylon Infra Design
pages.text: Beautification of Jharsuguda Airport Road | Pylon Infra Design Pylon Infra Design Home Projects Firm Process Contact Chat Home Projects Firm Process Contact Chat Urban Design Beautification of Jharsuguda Airport Road Jharsuguda, Odisha Overview A landscape and urban design initiative to transform the approach road to Jharsuguda Airport into a visually compelling, functional corridor with modern infrastructure and greenery. Design Intent To create a memorable first impression of Jharsuguda through thoughtful landscaping, street furniture, and lighting that reflects the region's progressive vision. Challenges & Solutions Working within existing road infrastructure constraints while introducing significant visual improvement, ensuring low-maintenance landscaping suitable for the local climate. Project Details Type Urban / Landscape Design Area 3.2 km corridor Status Completed Services Architectural Design Project Management Previous Simplex, Chandaka All Projects Next 50-Bedded Hostel Pylon Infra Design Contemporary architecture shaped by clarity, sustainability, and technical precision.
